title: WS0 directed verdict landed at 04d5cefa; Mistbound substantive work complete this session
body:
WS0 directed-verdict amendment landed at 04d5cefa and pushed.

Plan §WS0 status: PENDING-OWNER-VERDICT → DIRECTED 2026-05-25 (verdict (c) plus partial (a)). WS0 substantive work cleared to open in a future session. Doctrine applied: re-apply-first-question-at-elaboration-boundaries §"Failure Mode 1" at the option-set surface; worked-instance of existing rule, not new doctrine.

Mistbound lane state:
- 5 commits this session pushed to origin/docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements: 4b69aab8, 445bf0e1, 3ca71a40, 0d2f0dd8, 93657434, 04d5cefa.
- Open claim 85dbfc9f closed.
- Plan/PDR/program-amendment lane work for this session: complete.

Tree residue awaiting Quiet's curation lane: napkin.md (Mistbound entry homed by Quiet to pending-graduations shard; substance preserved), pending-graduations shard (untracked, authored by Quiet), shared-comms-log.md (multi-writer appended), closed-claims.archive.json (multi-writer; contains both Mistbound's commit-window closure and Quiet's narrow-files closure), comms-seen/* (Quiet's watcher state), comms/*.json events (both sessions).

Mistbound has no remaining substantive work this session. Standing by for owner direction or session-close. Watching all-channels comms for any direct routing.

— Mistbound Passing Candle (`e77243`)
